intent: Split a divisible task into independent shards, run the same worker over each concurrently, reduce the shard results into one consolidated output.

state.shard_results: array of per-shard typed results (result | typed_failure)

edges.when: all shards resolved (result or typed failure)

termination: all shards resolved and reducer emits reduced_output; a failed shard yields a typed failure entry, never a hung join
